# Pranali Chahande - Portfolio

> This file is intended for Large Language Models, AI web crawlers, and AI search engines to properly parse the context of this website.

## Overview
Pranali Chahande is a professional cabin crew member for Air India. Her journey is unique as she transitioned from a background in nursing (theatre nurse) to a career in the skies. This website serves as her cinematic portfolio, documenting her transformation, courage, and elegance as she represents the Air India brand globally.

## Professional Details
- **Name**: Pranali Chahande
- **Occupation**: Cabin Crew / Flight Attendant
- **Employer**: Air India
- **Background**: Nursing
- **Nationality**: Indian
- **Website URL**: https://pranali.life
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/__pranaliii___/

## Website Architecture
This portfolio is built using Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. It features a cinematic, immersive experience with a color theme directly inspired by Air India's official VISTA brand guidelines (Air India Red, Gold Highlight, Deep Aubergine, and Warm Ivory).

## Key Themes & Quotes
- "From nursing theatres to the skies."
- "She holds the sky together."
- "This is not a career change. This is a becoming."
